CustomField.description: Box can be manually checked within the Target Management Console to flag that the Asset has been included in the Trading team's RFP and allow this to be reflected in the Asset Target Audit's Progress field. (Field API name retained as pro_Target_Moved_To_Trading__c — only the label and downstream UI references have changed.)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tick when the Asset has been included in the Trading team's RFP. Drives the Asset Target Audit's Progress field.
CustomField.label: Included in Trading RFP
